title: Senior Financial Analyst - New India Assurance - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - New India Assurance - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, New India Assurance in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About New India Assurance:
New India Assurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance!
